  • Classes in org.yaml.snakeyaml.comments used by org.yaml.snakeyaml.comments 
    Class Description
    CommentEventsCollector
    Used by the Composer and Emitter to collect comment events so that they can be used at a later point in the process.
    CommentLine
    A comment line.
    CommentType
    The type of comment line.
